title: Thermal operating machine
abstract: A thermal machine with reverse cycle and steam compression and its operating method are described; the machine comprises: a condenser (2) downstream of and in fluid communication with a main compressor (6); a main lamination valve (9) downstream of the condenser (2); an evaporator (10) downstream of and in fluid communication with the lamination valve (9); an electric generator (13); an electric charge accumulator (15, 17); an automatic time-changing switch (14) configured depending on hourly production and consumption slots of an electric market, connected downstream of the electric generator (13) and before the accumulator (15, 17); at least one expander (7) connected to at least one alternator (8) in fluid communication between the evaporator (10) and the main compressor (6); and at least one heat exchanger (5) having a hot branch connected downstream to the condenser (2) and before the lamination valve (9) and a cold branch connected downstream to a second lamination valve (4) and upstream to the expander (7).
claims:
Claims 1. Thermal machine with reverse cycle and steam compression, comprising: - a condenser (2) downstream of and in fluid communication with a main compressor (6), made in such a way as to allow a working fluid to thermally interact with an outside environment which is seen as a thermal energy tank (3) ; - a main lamination valve (9) downstream of said condenser (2); - an evaporator (10) downstream of and in fluid communication with said lamination valve (9); - an electric generator (13) ; and - an electric charge accumulator (15, 17), characterized in that it further comprises: - an automatic time-changing switch (14) configured depending on hourly production and consumption slots of an electric market, connected downstream of said electric generator (13) and before said accumulator (15, 17); at least one expander (7) connected to at least one alternator (8) in fluid communication between said evaporator (10) and said main compressor (6); and at least one heat exchanger (5) having a hot branch connected downstream to said condenser (2) and before said lamination valve (9) and a cold branch connected downstream to a second lamination valve (4) and upstream to said expander (7) . 2. Method for actuating a thermal machine with reverse cycle and steam compression according to Claim 1, said method comprising the steps of: - automatically timing the switch (14) configured depending on hourly production and consumption slots of the electric market, downstream of the electric generator (13) and before the electric charge accumulator (15, 17) ; - supplying the compressors (1, 6) downstream of and in electric communication with said generator (13) ; - compressing the refrigerating fluid in the main compressor (6) ; - condensing the fluid in a condenser (2) downstream of and in fluid communication with said main compressor (6); - expanding the fluid in a main lamination valve (9) downstream of said condenser (2) ; - evaporating the fluid in an evaporator (10) downstream and in fluid communication with said main lamination valve (9), characterized in that it further comprises: - between said step of condensing and said step of expanding the fluid, at least one step of thermally exchanging, in at least one heat exchanger (5) , between the compressed refrigerating fluid circulating in a hot branch of the heat exchanger (5) and a related fractioning of the compressed refrigerating fluid taken upstream of the heat exchanger (5), cooled inside a second laminar member (4) and sliding in a cold branch of the heat exchanger (5) ; 

- between said main laminating step and said main compressing step, a step of pre-compressing the refrigerating fluid in a second compressor (1) ; - at least one step of expanding in at least one expander (7) connected to at least one alternator (8), of the fractioning of refrigerating fluid exiting the cold branch of the heat exchanger ( 5 ) .
